custom_plugins.label: Tabbed Comments Plugin V1
custom_plugins.description: A plugin that adds tabbed comments to a webpage, allowing users to organize and view comments in different categories or sections.

custom_plugins.label: Create Media Gallery Plugin
custom_plugins.description: A plugin that allows users to create and manage media galleries, including images, videos, and other media types.

custom_plugins.label: Prompt2 Plugin Moss
custom_plugins.description: A plugin like `window.prompt`, except async, and with a lot more features.

custom_plugins.label: Huge Emoji List
custom_plugins.description: A plugin that provides a comprehensive list of emojis, allowing users to easily access and use a wide variety of emojis in their projects or communications.

custom_plugins.label: Random Pokemon Generator
custom_plugins.description: Simply generates a random pokemon name at each click :)

custom_plugins.label: Random Animal Generator
custom_plugins.description: A simple generator that gives you a random animal name.
